description: 8-turn conversation establishing how the user wants progress updates. Tests recall of a single stable preference.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: For long-running tasks, send me progress updates as a short end-of-day digest, not real-time pings.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Understood — progress updates go in one end-of-day digest, no real-time pings.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Start the data migration whenever you're ready.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Migration started. I'll report status in the end-of-day digest.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Great. Keep the digest to three bullet points max.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Will do — end-of-day digest, three bullets max.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: How are you going to keep me updated on progress?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: A short end-of-day digest, three bullet points max — no real-time pings.

gold_answers.progress_update_style: Short end-of-day digest, three bullets max, no real-time pings
